title_cn: 美伊休战有望缓解通胀风险，黄金、白银飙升
summary: Gold and silver surged the most in about a month as hopes of a US-Iran deal drove oil prices lower and eased inflation expectations.

title: Iran War Optimism Propels Emerging-Market Stocks to Record High
title_cn: 伊朗战争乐观情绪推动新兴市场股市创历史新高
summary: Emerging-market stocks rallied to an all-time high and a currency index rose to pre-war levels as traders grew optimistic that the US and Iran are moving closer to a peace deal.

title: GameStop Makes $56B Bid For eBay, M&A Animal Spirits Are Strong At Milken | Bloomberg Deals 5/6/2026
title_cn: GameStop 出价 56B 美元收购 eBay，Milken 并购 Animal Spirit 势头强劲 |彭博社优惠 2026 年 5 月 6 日
summary: A weekly, midday program that delivers high-impact, editorially driven coverage of the most important corporate transactions shaping the global market. Today's guests: Searchlight Capital Founding Partner Eric Zinterhofer, OakTree Capital Co-Portfolio Manager, Global Credit Danielle Poli, Octagon Credit Investors CEO Gretchen Lam, and General Atlantic Co-President & Head of Global Growth Equity Martin Escobari. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dollar Hits Lowest Since War Started on Report End Is Near
title_cn: 报告即将结束，美元跌至战争开始以来的最低点
summary: The dollar wraps up Wednesday at the weakest level since February as investors are hopeful of the imminent end to the US-Iran war.

title: Ellevest CEO: Great Wealth Transfer Already Underway
title_cn: Ellevest首席执行官：伟大的财富转移已经在进行中
summary: Ellevest CEO Sylvia Kwan discusses ‘The Great Wealth Transfer’ and how the feminization of wealth will have the ripple effects throughout the economy. She talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Eli Lilly Sells $9 Billion of Bonds to Fund Acquisitions
title_cn: 礼来公司出售 90 亿美元债券以资助收购
summary: Eli Lilly & Co. sold $9 billion of investment-grade bonds Wednesday — the company’s biggest-ever issuance — as it looks to finance an acquisition spree.

title: Canada’s Carbon Tax Hinders Pipeline Plans, Cenovus CEO Says
title_cn: Cenovus 首席执行官表示，加拿大的碳税阻碍了管道计划
summary: Alberta’s planned oil pipeline to the west coast requires Canada to shift away from stricter climate policies and toward promoting greater oil production from new projects, Cenovus Energy Inc.’s chief executive officer said.

title: Worried About Public Market Depth for IPOs: Zinterhofer
title_cn: 担心首次公开募股的公开市场深度：Zinterhofer
summary:
Eric Zinterhofer, founding partner of Searchlight Capital, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." Wall Street banks are getting ready to raise billions of dollars taking data center companies public, even after IPO investors have already piled into anything that looks like a bet on artificial intelligence spending.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Women's Sports Investment an 'Undervalued Asset,' Says Gold Medal Skier Breezy Johnson
title_cn: 金牌滑雪运动员布雷齐·约翰逊表示，女子体育投资是“被低估的资产”
summary: Olympic gold medal skier Breezy Johnson and Trisha Worthington, chief revenue and philanthropic officer for US Ski & Snowboard, said that sports sponsorships are a 'changing landscape' as NIL opportunities for college athletes and social media expand the scope of moneymaking opportunities for athletes.  Johnson said that despite record valuation, women's sports are still an 'undervalued asset' for investment and can lead to a greater return.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vitol Is Turning to Mexico for Oil as War Disrupts Crude Market
title_cn: 由于战争扰乱原油市场，维托尔转向墨西哥购买石油
summary: Vitol Group is buying Mexican oil for the first time in a decade as the conflict in the Middle East roils global supply chains.

title: MetLife’s Improved PE Returns Lift Earnings Above Expectations
title_cn: 大都会人寿改善的 PE 回报使盈利超出预期
summary: MetLife Inc.’s first-quarter earnings surpassed Wall Street expectations, as the insurer continued to cash in higher gains from its private equity portfolio.

title: Ted Turner Was 'A Legend': Eric Zinterhofer
title_cn: 特德·特纳是“传奇”：埃里克·津特霍弗
summary: Eric Zinterhofer, founding partner of Searchlight Capital, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." Ted Turner, the swashbuckling billionaire who founded CNN, the first 24-hour news channel in the world, and turned his company into one of the biggest US cable-television systems before selling it to Time Warner Inc., has died. He was 87 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: FanDuel Names New Top Executive Amid Prediction Markets Push
title_cn: FanDuel 在预测市场推动下任命新高管
summary: Flutter Entertainment Plc. elevated FanDuel President Christian Genetski to lead its US betting business, replacing Amy Howe, who served as chief executive officer of FanDuel for more than five years.

title: Stocks Hit All-Time Highs on Hopes War Is Near End: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 市场希望战争即将结束，股市创下历史新高
summary: Stocks climbed around the world, joining gains in bonds as oil retreated on hopes the US and Iran are nearing a deal to end a war that has jolted markets and clouded the economic outlook.

title: Yen Spikes to 10-Week High and Sparks Intervention Chatter
title_cn: 日元飙升至 10 周高点并引发干预讨论
summary: Sharp moves in the Japanese yen that sent the currency to a 10-week high renewed speculation that the country is intervening in the market.

title: Canada May ‘Redeploy’ Capital Tied up in Airports, Carney Says
title_cn: 卡尼表示，加拿大可能会“重新部署”滞留在机场的资本
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney said his government is considering spinning off or selling ownership stakes in Canadian airports in order to use the proceeds on new projects aimed at fueling economic growth.

title: Elite M&A Lawyers Fed Massive Insider-Trading Ring, US Alleges
title_cn: 美国指控精英并购律师助长大规模内幕交易团伙
summary: Lawyers from top mergers and acquisitions firms provided tips on some of biggest deals of the last decade to an insider trading ring that made tens of millions of dollars in illegal profits, federal prosecutors said.

title: Gundlach Warns Investors Will Lose Money on Private Credit
title_cn: 冈拉克警告投资者将因私人信贷而蒙受损失
summary: DoubleLine Capital Chief Executive Officer Jeffrey Gundlach raised pointed questions about financial advisers and other intermediaries who ushered individual investors into private credit and other so-called semi-liquid funds, suggesting they’ve been motivated by high fees as much as by their clients’ interests.

title: Fortress Vice Chair Sloan on Maturity Wall Opportunities
title_cn: Fortress 副主席斯隆谈成熟度墙机会
summary: Fortress Vice Chairman & Global Head of Real Estate Tim Sloan discusses the impending commercial real estate maturity wall, and where he is looking for opportunities in the rest of the real estate market. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasury Repo Trading Debate Spurs Big Wagers on Lending Rates
title_cn: 国债回购交易争论引发对贷款利率的大赌注
summary: A discussion around the prospect of US Treasury investing its excess cash into short-term money markets unleashed a flurry of wagers betting on spread movements between overnight lending rates.

title: Oil and Gas Plunge as Iran Weighs New US Proposal to End War
title_cn: 伊朗考虑美国结束战争的新提议，石油和天然气价格暴跌
summary: Oil and natural gas fell sharply as Iran evaluated a new proposal from the US to end the war that has lasted nearly 10 weeks.

title: Foreign Demand for Treasury Debt Is Stalling, Trade Group Says
title_cn: 贸易组织表示，外国对国债的需求正在停滞
summary: Foreign investors are showing signs of diversifying away from US Treasuries as debt levels mount, according to the financial industry’s global trade group.

title: Brewers Owner Has No Plans to Sell Stake to PE
title_cn: 啤酒厂所有者没有计划将股权出售给私募股权公司
summary: Milwaukee Brewers Chair & Principal Owner Mark Attanasio talks about revenue sharing, ongoing labor negotiations, his vision for the team and says he doesn't ever expect to sell a stake in the team to private equity. Attanasio also talks about owning a pro soccer team in Europe. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bruin Capital Invests in the Tech Behind Sports, CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示，Bruin Capital 投资体育背后的技术
summary: Bruin Capital Founder & CEO George Pyne discusses investing in ‘second level enablers,’ the state of sports and entertainment media, and why globalization is the future. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: M&A Animal Spirits Are Strong at Milken
title_cn: 米尔肯的并购动物精神很强大
summary: Bloomberg's Matt Monks joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." They discuss dealmakers at the Milken Institute Global Conference, one of the most influential gatherings in global finance and policy, drawing a who’s who of CEOs, founders, financiers, politicians and celebrities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Searchlight Capital’s Zinterhofer Sees Bifurcated M&A Market
title_cn: Searchlight Capital 的 Zinterhofer 认为并购市场存在分歧
summary: Searchlight Capital Partners founding partner Eric Zinterhofer said he thinks dealmaking has bifurcated, with multiple buyers competing for good assets at high prices while less-viable companies are kept off the market.

title: Fed's Goolsbee Warns Against Reflexively Lowering Rates
title_cn: 美联储古尔斯比警告不要条件反射地降低利率
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of Chicago President Austan Goolsbee warns against reflexively lowering interest rates in response to faster productivity growth, as it can sometimes drive up inflation. He speaks at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Congo’s Biggest Lender Rawbank Posts 9% Rise in Annual Profit
title_cn: 刚果最大贷款机构 Rawbank 年度利润增长 9%
summary: Rawbank SA, the biggest lender in the Democratic Republic of Congo, saw after-tax profit increase at 9% to $232 million in 2025.

title: SpaceX IPO 'Will Be Volatile' Says Ark Invest's Cathie Wood
title_cn: Ark Invest 的 Cathie Wood 表示 SpaceX IPO“将会波动”
summary: Ark Invest CEO and CIO Cathie Wood joined Bloomberg's Carol Massar and Joe Mathieu at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverley Hills, California. She   talks about a potential IPO for Elon Musk's SpaceX, Musk investing more in chips, the need for data centers and the growth of AI stocks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CVS Results Beat, Extending Healthcare Win Streak
title_cn: CVS 业绩好于预期，扩大医疗保健连胜纪录
summary: CVS raised its earnings outlook for the year after profit and revenue in the first quarter exceeded analyst expectations, the latest in a string of positive reports from US health conglomerates. Ike Swetlitz reports on Bloomberg Open Interest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hut 8 Jumps Most Since 2021 on Texas AI Data Center Lease
title_cn: Hut 8 德克萨斯州人工智能数据中心租赁量自 2021 年以来涨幅最大
summary: Hut 8 Corp., a cryptocurrency miner that is shifting to developing artificial intelligence data center capacity, gained the most in five years after the company signed a lease worth at least $9.8 billion to provide computing power to a “high-investment-grade company.”

title: JPMorgan-Led Group Eyes $500 Million Loss on Qualtrics Debt
title_cn: 摩根大通领导的集团预计 Qualtrics 债务损失 5 亿美元
summary: A group of banks led by JPMorgan Chase & Co. is expected to shoulder paper losses of more than $500 million on a debt deal for software firm Qualtrics International Inc., according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Snap Says Advertising Revenue Buffeted by Effects of War in Iran
title_cn: Snap 称广告收入受到伊朗战争影响
summary: Snap Inc. projected sales in the current quarter that were in line with Wall Street estimates, while noting a key part of its business has been hampered by the war in the Middle East.

title: Biggest US Grid Must Redesign to Cope With AI Boom, CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示，美国最大的电网必须重新设计以应对人工智能的繁荣
summary: The biggest US power grid needs a revamp to cope with the unprecedented surge in electricity demand stemming from the data-center boom, said Chief Executive Officer David Mills.

title: Sony to Pay Almost $4B for Bieber, Neil Young Catalog
title_cn: 索尼将支付近 40 亿美元购买比伯、尼尔·杨目录
summary: Bloomberg's Chris Palmeri joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." Sony Music is finalizing a deal to acquire a music catalog from Blackstone that includes works of Justin Bieber and Neil Young in one of the largest such deals in music history, according to people familiar with the matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AMD Soars on Blockbuster AI-Fueled Forecast | Bloomberg Tech 5/6/2026
title_cn: AMD 因 AI 推动的预测而飙升 |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 6 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde discusses Advanced Micro Devices' strong forecast that sent shares climbing. Plus, Disney posts stronger than expected results on the back of earnings thanks to improved profitability at its streaming business. And, Uber's CFO talks about the ride-hailing giant’s push into premium offerings as the company posts a second-quarter outlook that beat expectations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Arm Gains After Push Into AI Data Centers Bolsters Forecast
title_cn: Arm 进军人工智能数据中心后收益增强预测
summary: Arm Holdings Plc jumped in late trading after the company delivered a solid forecast and touted the demand for a new homegrown chip, signaling that a push into data center infrastructure is paying off.

title: Meta-Backed Scale AI Wins $500 Million Defense Department Deal
title_cn: 元支持的规模人工智能赢得国防部 5 亿美元的交易
summary: The Pentagon awarded a $500 million contract to Meta Platforms Inc.-backed Scale AI to help sift through data and assist in decision-making, the latest step in the US military’s effort to rely more on artificial intelligence.

title: DoorDash Gives a Forecast for Order Growth That Tops Estimates
title_cn: DoorDash 给出的订单增长预测超出预期
summary: DoorDash Inc. gave a forecast for order value in the current period that topped analyst estimates, signaling continued customer growth for the food-delivery company.

title: How NASA’s Chief Plans to Bring Back the Moonwalk — And Beat China
title_cn: 美国宇航局局长计划如何恢复月球漫步——并击败中国
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman sits down with Bloomberg’s Tim Stenovec to talk about why the US needs to beat China to the moon, how he plans to vie with SpaceX and Blue Origin for top talent and what exactly he thinks alien life looks like. Listen to The Big Take podcast on Apple, Spotify or wherever you get your podcasts.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anthropic Inks Computing Deal With SpaceX to Meet AI Demand
title_cn: Anthropic 与 SpaceX 签署计算协议以满足人工智能需求
summary: Anthropic PBC has signed an agreement with Elon Musk’s SpaceX to bolster computing resources and meet surging demand for its Claude artificial intelligence software.

title: Blackstone, KKR Consider Google Deal in Surge of AI Tie-Ups
title_cn: Blackstone 和 KKR 考虑与 Google 达成人工智能合作激增的交易
summary: Bloomberg's Allison McNeely joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." Blackstone and KKR are in talks with Alphabet to give the companies they own access to Google’s artificial intelligence models, according to people familiar with the matter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CoreWeave’s Chip-Backed Loan Racks Up $19 Billion of Demand
title_cn: CoreWeave 的芯片支持贷款需求增加 190 亿美元
summary: CoreWeave Inc. racked up $19 billion of investor orders for a $3.1 billion loan backed by customer contracts for microchips, according to people familiar with the matter, the first of its kind to be broadly syndicated in the US leveraged loan market.

title: GameStop's $56B eBay Bid Comes Under Question
title_cn: GameStop 56B 美元的 eBay 出价受到质疑
summary: Bloomberg's Spencer Soper joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Deals." GameStop is trying to buy eBay for about $56 billion in cash and stock, a bold attempt by Ryan Cohen to take over a storied e-commerce name several times larger. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Charlesbank CEO: ‘Back to Basics’ in Private Equity
title_cn: Charlesbank首席执行官：私募股权“回归基础”
summary:
Charlesbank Flagship Managing Partner, CEO & Co-Head Michael Choe discusses going ‘back to basics’ in private equity and the opportunities facing middle-market investors. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California.
Original filename: 20260506_184408_Interview_of_Michael_Choe_on_Software_Stress_and_PE_Reset.mp4 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Eldridge President: Data Center Demand ‘Not Going Away’
title_cn: 埃尔德里奇总裁：数据中心需求“不会消失”
summary: Eldridge Industries Co-Founder & President Tony Minella discusses leaning into AI as an ‘enabler,’ why AI data center demand is not going away, and the undeniable strength of the equity markets. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber Signals Growing US Demand
title_cn: 优步发出美国需求不断增长的信号
summary: Uber delivered a better-than-expected forecast, signaling that robust demand from US commuters and travelers will offset the impact from geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. Uber CFO Balaji Krishnamurthy spoke with Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple to Let Users Choose Rival AI Models
title_cn: 苹果将​​让用户选择竞争对手的人工智能模型
summary: Apple will let users choose from a range of outside AI services to power features across its software, according to sources. Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman explains how this builds on a strategy to turn its devices into a comprehensive AI platform. He joins Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Will.i.am on Ethical AI Use & Growing AI Opportunities
title_cn: Will.i.am 谈人工智能的道德使用和不断增长的人工智能机会
summary: Musician, producer, entertainer, and founder of FYI.AI Will.i.am discusses his new AI-focused course emphasizing ethics and accountability in deploying AI agents, as well as other growing AI market opportunities. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pitney Bowes CEO Sees Strong Economy Despite Global Uncertainty
title_cn: 尽管全球存在不确定性，必能宝首席执行官仍认为经济强劲
summary: Pitney Bowes CEO Kurt Wolf told Bloomberg Open Interest that his company is seeing strength in the economy despite global uncertainty, with consumers remaining strong and businesses continuing to invest in the future.  Plus, he shares insights into Pitney Bowes’ turnaround and potential strategic moves. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UAE AI Firm Anchors New Downtown Minneapolis Data Center
title_cn: 阿联酋人工智能公司落户明尼阿波利斯市中心新数据中心
summary: A unit of G42, the Abu Dhabi tech conglomerate backed by Emirati royal Sheikh Tahnoon bin Zayed al Nahyan, has signed on as the primary tenant for an office-to-data center conversion in Minneapolis, part of its nascent push to compete for AI business in the US.

title: Mexican Drug Cartels Use TikTok for Recruiting, Amplifying Propaganda
title_cn: 墨西哥贩毒集团利用 TikTok 招募人员、扩大宣传
summary: Coded language helps avoid moderators, researchers say.

title: SpaceX Flags at Least $55 Billion Investment in Chip Plant
title_cn: SpaceX 预计将投资至少 550 亿美元建设芯片工厂
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX estimated a chip factory it plans to build along with Tesla Inc. will cost at least $55 billion, with total investment potentially exceeding the amount the rocket maker aims to raise from a record initial public offering. Bloomberg's George Ferguson joins Bloomberg Intelligence to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple to Let Users Choose Rival AI Models Across Its iOS 27 Features
title_cn: 苹果将​​允许用户在其 iOS 27 功能中选择竞争对手的人工智能模型
summary: Apple is set to revamp Siri and will let users choose from a range of outside artificial intelligence services to power features across its software, building on a strategy to turn its devices into a comprehensive AI platform. Mark Gurman explains (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Inks $500 Million Deal With Fiber-Optic Maker Corning
title_cn: Nvidia 与光纤制造商康宁签署 5 亿美元协议
summary: Nvidia Corp. bought $500 million worth of rights for shares in the fiber-optic cable maker Corning Inc. as part of a broader partnership between the two companies aimed at expanding artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: World Cup Fans Get Site to Help Manage Northeast Transit Chaos
title_cn: 世界杯球迷设立网站来帮助管理东北部的交通混乱
summary: World Cup fans now have an online resource to help them navigate passenger rail options for getting to matches in the Northeast.

title: Google Makes EU Offer to Avert Fines in News Search Case
title_cn: 谷歌向欧盟提出在新闻搜索案中避免罚款的提议
summary: Google has proposed changes to how it displays news results across its search engine in a bid to avoid adding to its €9.5 billion ($11.2 billion) running total of European Union competition fines.

title: Invesco's Brill on the Big Tech Debt Frenzy to Fund AI
title_cn: 景顺（Invesco）在为人工智能提供资金的大型科技债务狂潮中表现出色
summary: Technology companies are selling bonds anywhere they can to help pay for their gusher of spending on artificial intelligence, according to Matt Brill, head of North America investment-grade credit for Invesco. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google DeepMind Takes Minority Stake in ‘Eve Online’ Maker
title_cn: 谷歌 DeepMind 收购《夏娃在线》制作公司少数股权
summary: Artificial intelligence research is plunging further into video games.

title: Modi, Lam Meet as India and Vietnam Deepen AI, Defense Ties
title_cn: 莫迪与林郑月娥会面，印度和越南深化人工智能和国防关系
summary: India and Vietnam agreed to strengthen economic and defense ties as both sides seek to deepen their partnership while tensions persist in the Middle East.

title: Trump Says 'We Won' When Asked About Latest on Iran
title_cn: 当被问及伊朗最新局势时，特朗普说“我们赢了”
summary: "They want to make a deal badly," President Donald Trump says when asked about the latest developments in the Iran conflict during remarks with reporters at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Shows He Still Has Clout With GOP as Wider Popularity Declines
title_cn: 随着更广泛的支持率下降，特朗普表明他对共和党仍有影响力
summary: The Indiana primary results were a victory, but came at a cost.

title: Corporations Contend With Iran Economic Fallout | Balance of Power: Early Edition 5/06/2026
title_cn: 企业应对伊朗经济影响|权力平衡：早期版本 5/06/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power,  Bloomberg's Joe Mathieu and Carol Massar discuss the geoeconomics impact of the US war with Iran, as both countries weigh a deal to end the conflict. Joe and Carol also discuss the current sports investment landscape as they talk to celebrated athletes and top league officials. On today's show, Principal Asset Management chief global strategist Seema Shah, leader for Hogan Lovells’ Government Relations and Public Affairs Practice. Aaron Cutler, Driscoll's CEO Soren Bjorn, Olympic Gold Medalist Breezy Johnson and chief revenue and philanthropic officer for US Ski & Snowboard Breezy Johnson, administrator for the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services Dr. Mehmet Oz, and NASCAR Hall of Famer and Vice Chairman of Henrick Motorsports Jeff Gordon and NASCAR chief operating officer Ben Kennedy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DOJ Says UCLA Medical School Selected Students Based on Race
title_cn: 司法部称加州大学洛杉矶分校医学院根据种族选择学生
summary: The Justice Department said it uncovered evidence that the University of California at Los Angeles’ medical school intentionally and illegally selected applicants based on their race.

title: Rise of F1 in US Means All of Motorsports is Growing Says NASCAR Hall of Farmer Jeff Gordon
title_cn: F1 在美国的崛起意味着所有赛车运动都在发展
summary:
NASCAR Hall of Famer Jeff Gordon and chief operating officer Ben Kennedy discussed growth initiatives aimed at expanding media rights deals and getting an iconic American sport in front of younger viewers. 
Asked about the rise in Formula 1 fans in the United States, Gordon said that despite the differences between the two organizations, he believes motorsports is growing 'everybody's growing along with it.'  Gordon and Kennedy also discussed the important of well-known manufacturers to the success of NASCAR in the domestic market.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GOP House Chair Says Lutnick Not ‘100% Truthful’ on Epstein Ties
title_cn: 共和党众议院主席称卢特尼克在爱泼斯坦关系问题上并非“100%真实”
summary: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick, a former neighbor of Jeffrey Epstein who visited the disgraced financier on his Caribbean island, on Wednesday became the first sitting cabinet member to testify to the US House committee investigating the sex offender’s crimes and possible lapses in the law enforcement response.

title: US, Iran Weigh Potential Deal as Trump Pressured to End War
title_cn: 在特朗普施压结束战争之际，美国和伊朗正在考虑可能达成的协议
summary: The US and Iran were circling around a fresh proposal to end the war on Wednesday, as President Donald Trump searches for an exit from a conflict that has spiked energy prices and damaged his political standing.

title: Trump Policies Will Double Life Expectancy of Medicare Trust Fund, Says Dr. Oz
title_cn: 奥兹博士表示，特朗普的政策将使医疗保险信托基金的预期寿命增加一倍
summary:
Dr. Mehmet Oz, administrator for the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services, said that Trump policies aimed at the Affordable Care Act will double the life expectancy of the Medicare trust fund by weeding out fraud in the system. 
Oz said that lack of system oversight on fraudulent medical practices, including hospice care in Los Angeles, encourages corruption in the health care industry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dr. Oz on Fighting Fraud, Lowering Drug Costs
title_cn: 奥兹博士谈打击欺诈、降低药品成本
summary: Dr. Mehmet Oz, administrator of the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services, talks about how the White House is making prescription drugs more affordable, fighting fraud in healthcare, and the future of Medicare. He speaks to Bloomberg Television at the Milken Global Conference.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine Chief Negotiator Set to Travel to US to Meet Witkoff
title_cn: 乌克兰首席谈判代表将前往美国会见维特科夫
summary: Ukraine’s chief negotiator, Rustem Umerov, is expected to travel to Miami to meet with US special envoy Steve Witkoff as early as this week, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: DOJ Plans Intervention in Trump Supreme Court Carroll Appeal
title_cn: 司法部计划干预特朗普最高法院卡罗尔上诉
summary: The US Justice Department will ask the Supreme Court to let it intervene in President Donald Trump’s appeal of the $83.3 million jury verdict against him in a defamation suit brought by former Elle magazine advice columnist E. Jean Carroll.

title: Trump Says US Is Dealing With Right People in Iran
title_cn: 特朗普称美国正在与伊朗的正确人士打交道
summary: President Donald Trump says the US is dealing with people in Iran that want to make a deal to end the war. He speaks at the White House. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine Looks Beyond Summer Offensive to a Crucial Winter in the War
title_cn: 乌克兰将目光从夏季攻势转向战争中关键的冬季
summary: Volodymyr Zelenskiy is asking Western allies to speed up deliveries of air-defense systems and interceptor missiles to prepare for another winter of intense bombing that could prove to be the next critical moment in Kyiv’s battle to resist the Russian invasion.

title: US Disables Iran-Flagged Ship That Tried to Break Blockade
title_cn: 美国禁止试图突破封锁的悬挂伊朗国旗的船只
summary: The US military disabled an Iran-flagged tanker that tried to dock at an Iranian port on the Gulf of Oman in violation of President Donald Trump’s blockade, the latest flareup around the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Iranian Proxies in Lebanon, Iraq Threaten Tenuous Ceasefire
title_cn: 黎巴嫩和伊拉克的伊朗代理人威胁停火
summary: As the Iran war grinds on, the US is ramping up pressure on allies in Iraq and Lebanon to neuter Tehran-linked proxies whose continued attacks threaten a tenuous ceasefire and remain a source of significant leverage for the Islamic Republic.

title: FBI Raids Office of Virginia Democrat Who Pushed Redistricting
title_cn: 联邦调查局突袭推动重新划分选区的弗吉尼亚民主党办公室
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation executed search warrants Wednesday at the Virginia office of L. Louise Lucas, one of the state’s most powerful Democrats, according to a person familiar with the investigation.

title: Ukraine Strikes on Russian Oil Climb to 4-Month High
title_cn: 乌克兰对俄罗斯石油的袭击升至四个月高位
summary: Ukraine’s attacks on Russian oil infrastructure climbed to the highest monthly level since December, cutting the neighboring nation’s refinery runs to multi-year lows.

title: The Labour Contenders Who Could Replace a Weakened Starmer
title_cn: 谁可以取代实力较弱的斯塔默的工党竞争者
summary: Doubts about Keir Starmer’s future as prime minister has fed months of plots and paranoia within the Labour Party about who, if anyone, might be ready to take his place. A bad set of results in the UK’s local elections would trigger more speculation.

title: Iran Seeks an Edge as Diplomacy Builds Toward Possible War Deal
title_cn: 伊朗寻求优势，通过外交努力达成可能的战争协议
summary: A flurry of diplomatic activity in the last 24 hours suggests the US and Iran are making a fresh push to end their two-month war. Beyond the spotlight, leaders in Iran are making sure to tend to alliances with Russia and China along the way.

title: Gunman in DC Attack Built Arsenal to Target Officials
title_cn: 华盛顿特区袭击中的枪手建造了阿森纳以瞄准官员
summary: The man accused of storming the White House Correspondents’ Dinner spent years quietly acquiring his arsenal, purchasing a shotgun from a Torrance, California, firearms dealer eight months before the attack and a semi-automatic pistol two years earlier, according to a law enforcement intelligence profile reviewed by Bloomberg.

title: Trump Administration Explores Nuclear-Powered Commercial Ships
title_cn: 特朗普政府探索核动力商船
summary: A federal agency wants to learn how nuclear reactors could help the US expand its commercial presence on the high seas.

title: How Trump Has Made the Doctor Shortage Worse
title_cn: 特朗普如何加剧医生短缺
summary: The administration is backing off one part of its sweeping immigration crackdown on overseas physicians, but applicants worry it may be too late to meet the critical residency and fellowship start date on July 1.

title: How Local UK Elections Could Decide Starmer’s Fate
title_cn: 英国地方选举如何决定斯塔默的命运
summary: Britons will head to the polls on Thursday for one of the most consequential rounds of local elections in memory, with control of the Scottish and Welsh parliaments and more than half of England’s councils at stake.

title: Trump Shows Control Over Republican Base With Primary Wins
title_cn: 特朗普以初选胜利显示出对共和党基础的控制
summary: President Donald Trump demonstrated his sway over the Republican party base in a deep red state after he supported a group of challengers to Indiana state senators who had defied the president by refusing his push for redistricting.

title: Probe of Trump Foes Upends Justice Department’s Miami Hub
title_cn: 对特朗普敌人的调查颠覆了司法部的迈阿密中心
summary: Shortly after ascending to the top of the Justice Department last month, Todd Blanche gathered prosecutors in Miami to press for results from a highly sensitive probe into some of President Donald Trump’s perceived political enemies.

title: France Says Maritime Group Ready to Escort Ships in Hormuz
title_cn: 法国称海事集团已准备好为霍尔木兹海峡的船只护航
summary: A maritime coalition led by France and the UK is ready to escort tankers through the Strait of Hormuz if Iran agrees to a US proposal to end the war, according to a French official.
